programme.desc: When Uncle Rad and Frisky accidentally turn up to babysit Bluey and Bingo on the same night, they have to work together to make Bluey feel better about babysitter put-downs.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E4 - Socks
programme.desc: It's laundry day in Playtime Towers, and Bella and Lift have washed everyone's socks. All they need to do now is find the matching pairs!

programme.title: E11 - The Pottery Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: E20 - Tower Bridge, London
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is visiting London and spots the perfect souvenir hat. But he's run out of pocket money, so he decides to earn some as a tour guide.

programme.title: E6 - Gordon Gets The Giggles
programme.desc: Gordon becomes very worried when he gets a serious case of the giggles. He must find a way to control his laughter before it does any damage.

programme.title: E10 - Garden Gaming
programme.desc: Duck is getting frustrated with his new computer game, so Sarah builds a new version.

programme.title: E23 - Cake
programme.desc: Hattie needs help to bake a cake - and Stan's on his way! No challenge is too small or too unusual, and Stan's always happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: E38 - The Dressing Up Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.title: E37 - The Traffic Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.title: E26 - Kiwi
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Kiwi performing Do the Kiwi Dance - if he manages to find someone to interview him first.

programme.title: E36 - Toy Aisle Trouble
programme.desc: Evil Pea takes all the toys in the supermarket for herself and the Cobs to play with. Supertato climbs a big wall of boxes to try and get the toys back.

programme.title: Electric Current and Power
programme.desc: How do batteries work? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of electricity. Have hands-on fun by making a battery using lemons, and get to know Nikola Tesla, physicist, engineer and inventor, who conceived the modern alternating current supply system.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Sneezy Snufflies
programme.desc: When Mrs. Rorschach suddenly develops an allergy, every indictor points to Mr. Tiggles as the cause. Addison has to solve the mystery before Mrs. Rorschach and her kitty are forced to part ways forever!

programme.title: The Missing Mammoth
programme.desc: Ms. Bell has planned to surprise her students by hiding mammoth fossils in the school sandpit for them to dig up. But the surprise is on Ms. Bell and her students when the fossils disappear – and Addison has figure out where they went.

programme.title: Trip to Tahiti
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo have a presentation to prepare for school, and they are scratching their heads to find the most original way to do this. Our friends travel to Tahiti, where they meet with Amana and learn more about telling a story through dance.

programme.title: Programming and Coding
programme.desc: How did people compute before the invention of computers? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of computing. Have hands-on fun by making your own abacus, and get to know Ada Lovelace, the first computer programmer before the invention of computers.

programme.title: Ebb and the Greedy Gulls
programme.desc: Ebb and Bird lose their breakfast to a greedy gull. Unaware, Flo takes them for a beach picnic and Ebb has to guard the sandwiches from the gulls. Ebb gets the blame for eating the sandwiches until Flo discovers the truth and is sorry for doubting Ebb.

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: Jesters
programme.desc: Lord Roach is feeling really down! His wife Geraldine goes out of her way to entertain him, bringing in acrobats, musicians, etc. But it's no good. Enter Little Lewis, dressed in his court jester costume and Lord Roach is very happy.

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Rocky Mountain adventure: Snowboard lessons, stunt park thrills, extreme tricks at Progresh, Mega-Ramp stunts, Denver exploration, and horseback riding into the Garden of the Gods. A week of adrenaline-fueled escapades with Nicole and teens in Colorado!

programme.title: From the Stars
programme.desc: The Nektons try to stop a fallen satellite's fuel from polluting a marine sanctuary. But someone else is also interested in the satellite.

programme.title: Secret Code
programme.desc: Eric learns that computer coding means writing programmes that tell robots and computers how to do certain jobs. Just as we use language to communicate with other people, there are lots of different programming or 'coding' languages to talk to computers.

programme.title: My Fair Fico
programme.desc: Team Doki is invited to a dinner party at a palace in Denmark. They're excited to be going to such a fancy affair. Anabella and Gabi worry that Fico might embarrass them with his poor table manners! Doki doesn't think it's a big deal. What are manners for, anyway?

programme.title: Secret Code
programme.desc: Eric learns that computer coding means writing programmes that tell robots and computers how to do certain jobs. Just as we use language to communicate with other people, there are lots of different programming or 'coding' languages to talk to computers.

programme.title: Electromagnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an electromagnet using a nail, a battery and some electrical wire. The electricity passing through the wire creates an invisible force called a magnetic field, making the nail work like a magnet. He uses it to pick up paper clips from the table.

programme.title: Sensational Senses!
programme.desc: Eric is blindfolded and has to figure out what a mystery object is using his other four senses – hearing, taste, touch and smell. He learns that although most animals have the same senses people do, they use them differently.

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Is there a country where even toddlers happily eat the spiciest dishes? Our heroes travel to Thailand to find out. And Alim's penfriend Narawan prepares a spicy meal.

programme.title: Blowin' in the Wind
programme.desc: Ant is tasked with taking a leaf back to his anthill. This seems simple enough until nature conspires to make it a task of Herculian proportions.

programme.title: The Swan in Swamp Lake
programme.desc: Rose meets Magister Rapunzel, but dislikes climbing Library Tower. After Rapunzel argues with Astoria, Rose, Astoria, Hawk, Joy, and Travis are sent to the swamp. Chaos ensues when Joy becomes a frog, Vicky creates a monster, and the swan princess appears.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: The China Connection
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China's economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E196 - Married to Money
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs takes Plankton's advice, and finally marries the only thing he ever loved...money!

programme.title: E109 - Return of the Kid
programme.desc: Henry Hart's back and stealing Ray's attention from crime fighting so Danger Force is forced to go on a bunch of exhausting missions without Captain Man. But the mood dims when a scary Bounty Hunter from Dystopia comes to Swellview looking for Henry.

programme.title: E126 - Study Muffin / Homespun
programme.desc: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: E258 - Boss for a Day / The Goofy Newbie
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. What could go wrong? // Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.

programme.title: E412 - Papa Smurf Lost His Mind
programme.desc: After a knock to the head, Papa Smurf loses his memory and starts acting like a child. There's only one solution: take him to Gargamel.

programme.title: E242 - Gary & Spot
programme.desc: Sandy narrates the nocturnal adventures of Gary and his secret pal - Spot.

programme.title: E905 - Prom-Com / Scene Steeler

programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Grandpa Max find the Weatherheads using the towering turbines for their latest nefarious plan.

programme.title: E229 - Nostalgia Is Not A Substitute For An Actual Story/Business Ethics Wink Wink/Slapping
programme.desc: The Titans time travel back to the 1980s to determine whether or not it was the best decade ever.

programme.title: E107 - General Hogspital
programme.desc: Hamton gets into medical school but soon realizes it’s not at all what he imagined. Buster desperately tries to find a way to bring his pal back to Acme Loo.

programme.title: E1358 - Tv Knight 7/We'll Be Right Back/Jump City Rock/Natural Gas/The Score
programme.desc: To avoid chores, Batman and Gordon time travel to the future, but still find ways to watch TV.

programme.title: E10 - Prank Callers/Dizzy/Access Denied/Steak Me Amadeus/New Year's Kiss
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby decide to make prank phone calls. They try to prank the Master Prank Caller numerous times, although they fail to fool him (and only make him increasingly annoyed).

programme.title: E148 - Pardon The Garden/ Put The Cat Out: Flat On The Door/ Downward Duck/Lesson Plan 9 Fro
programme.desc: Petunia Pig wants to garden, but all she grows is trouble! Sylvester is a-door-able. Yoga is relaxing – unless Daffy is your instructor.

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E1 - A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his friends for a fun school day at Melon Patch Academy! Ms. Appleberry finds exciting ways to learn, like using building blocks & drawings to practice the alphabet. Then, the kids play a fun guessing game to learn all about the five senses & how to sign them in ASL! The learning continues as they sing about the days of the week, play a fun alphabet photo game on a rainy day & enjoy story time with the whole family. It's a day packed with learning & fun!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Magical Dreamland Dance Party!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a dance party in a magical dreamland! Blast off to outer space to sing & dance among the stars with a friendly Bunny Astronaut. Then, travel to imaginary lands to party with magical friends like unicorns & mermaids! The adventure continues as you stomp your feet & snap your claws along with dinosaurs to the 'Snap, Snap, Snap' song. With fun copy-me dances & beautiful ballet moves, it's a dance party beyond your wildest dreams!

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Splashin' Jungle Jams!
programme.desc: Get your dancing shoes ready for JJ's Splashin' Jungle Jams! The party starts at the beach with a fun game of freeze dance on the sand. Then, dive deep under the sea to learn the ABCs with jellyfish & shark friends & swim like a beautiful mermaid! The adventure continues deep in the jungle where you can dance with gorillas, snakes & crocodiles. From popping bubbles to doing a silly animal dance, it's a wild party at the beach & in the jungle!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E1 - A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his friends for a fun school day at Melon Patch Academy! Ms. Appleberry finds exciting ways to learn, like using building blocks & drawings to practice the alphabet. Then, the kids play a fun guessing game to learn all about the five senses & how to sign them in ASL! The learning continues as they sing about the days of the week, play a fun alphabet photo game on a rainy day & enjoy story time with the whole family. It's a day packed with learning & fun!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E1 - A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!

E4 - Mountains
programme.desc: Climb into a realm of thin air and towering rock. Tag along as mythical monkeys battle for a winter food stash, sing along with lemurs in a fruit-filled tree canopy, and watch an aromatic tree bring together blossom and possum in a moonlit tryst.

programme.title: E4 - Mountains
programme.desc: Climb into a realm of thin air and towering rock. Tag along as mythical monkeys battle for a winter food stash, sing along with lemurs in a fruit-filled tree canopy, and watch an aromatic tree bring together blossom and possum in a moonlit tryst.

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E1 - Body Language
programme.desc: Join researchers as they study how animals communicate. Find out how wolves use their body language to unite the pack and maintain a sophisticated social structure, and see the astounding number of gestures chimps use to communicate.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: What Happens When A Town Creates Its Own Currency?
programme.desc: If you join carsharing or buy solar panels, you get paid money in a currency of its own in the small town Traunstein at Lake Chiemsee in Germany. The trick: you can only spend the 'Chiemgauer” in stores and pubs in the region, which again should cut Co2 emissions. Does it work?

programme.title: The Future Of Farming
programme.desc: From agri-influencers to AI in cowsheds and autonomous tractors: Modern technologies are transforming agriculture worldwide. Machines are increasingly handling physically demanding tasks, both in barns and in fields.

programme.title: The Magazine For Africa's Youth
programme.desc: This week on the 77 Percent we explore how the pressure body appearances and desire for the” ideal body type” has led to many seeking cosmetic and plastic surgery the world of cosmetic surgery in the African continent

programme.title: Stumbling Stones - Lest We Forget
programme.desc: ‘Stolpersteine', or ‘stumbling stones' placed in the pavement commemorate the victims of Nazism. The squares are made of brass and measure 10cm x 10cm. More than 100,000 of these memorial plaques have been laid in over 30 countries.

programme.title: Nour Graduates From School - A Young Syrian Woman In Eastern Germany
programme.desc: It was 2015 when Nour Elhouda Al Ahmad Alhammash and her family arrived in eastern Germany. After fleeing Syria, the then nine-year-old was enrolled in the first grade at a school in the village of Golzow, Brandenburg.

Expect a Miracle
programme.desc: Miss Sung has come to Hong Kong to be a teacher, and hopefully moonlight as a model. On the Internet, she starts to talk with 'Blue Moon', a photographer. While attempting to shoot, the two have an argument, and Sung seems to lose her chance at being a model, until a second consideration by Jet leads to a completed shoot. Love between the two begins to bloom, but Jet's stepsister, who is also one of Miss Sung's students, starts to interfere, and may just ruin everything.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E50
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E6 - 解鎖江蘇園林之美
programme.desc: 聚焦「非物質文化遺產」主題，由孟非領銜，並邀請了數位00後的非物質文化遺產研學團，一同圍繞8個主題進行深度探訪，旨在全方位、立體化地展現非物質文化遺產的深厚底蘊與時代風采。

programme.title: E12 - 十大專屬告白
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 以美食出發，傳遞家鄉的味道，用最質樸的方式製作美食，給海外遊子送去家人的慰藉，傳遞濃濃的思鄉之情。

programme.title: E9 - Philippe Turbide, Mountain Bike Guide In Utah
programme.desc: In the USA, mountain bike guide Philippe Turbide welcomes Nadine and Francois. The two experienced cyclists dream of testing themselves on the trails of the Moab Desert, including the Porcupine Rim, described as one of the most beautiful American trails, and tackling the steep slopes of Navajo Rocks.

programme.title: E7 - Transformation Of An Old Mill Into An Eco-Friendly Guesthouse
programme.desc: In Herve, two sisters have transformed an 18th-century mill into a large, modern, and eco-friendly guesthouse: Rives 903. Also: Marin Montagut's chic country universe; how to reduce the use of fossil energy in homes; installing wallpaper and a wooden frame.

programme.title: E92
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: Remembering Leslie: Shanghai Grand
programme.desc: The Taiwan military officer, Hsu falls into the enemy's ambush, and floats to the Shanghai shore where he is saved by Ting Lik. Lik teams up with Kueng to try to make a fortune and soon they become famous in Shanghai. The Shanghai tycoon Fung try to eliminate other opponents with the help of Hsu and Lik. Later, Hsu discovers Fung is the mastermind of the ambush that killed all his fellow officials...
